name: contacts-unify
description: Consolidate and dedupe contacts across macOS/iCloud/Google/Zoho/VCF into one address book with a provenance-aware review UI. Optional, opt-in Phase B ranks who you talk to from iMessage and builds research dossiers only on people you explicitly name.

interface.shortDescription: Consolidate and dedupe contacts across macOS/iCloud/Google/Zoho/VCF into one address book with a provenance-aware review UI. Optional, opt-in Phase B ranks who you talk to from iMessage and builds research dossiers only on people you explicitly name.
interface.longDescription: Consolidate and dedupe contacts across macOS/iCloud/Google/Zoho/VCF into one address book with a provenance-aware review UI. Optional, opt-in Phase B ranks who you talk to from iMessage and builds research dossiers only on people you explicitly name. Works best on a local machine with user-specific files and tools available.
defaultPrompt: Consolidate and dedupe my contacts across all sources into one address book, giving me a simple review UI that shows competing values with provenance and edit dates so I choose the winners. Back up first, dry-run before any change.
